copywriting.hero_title: Trusted Rooftop Solar Installer in Pune
copywriting.hero_subtitle: Reduce your monthly MSEDCL bills with high-efficiency solar systems designed for Pune bungalows, housing societies, and commercial complexes.
copywriting.about_title: Helping Pune Homes & Businesses Cut Electricity Costs
copywriting.about_text: At Deccan Solar Tech, led by Vijay Patil, we help Pune residents and businesses beat rising Maharashtra power rates. We provide custom solar installations in Kothrud, Baner, Hinjawadi, and Bhosari. From handling MSEDCL net-metering approvals to processing government subsidies, we build reliable, high-yield solar arrays that last 25+ years.

services.title: Residential Solar Rooftop
services.description: Lower your monthly MSEDCL bill. Perfect for Pune bungalows and cooperative housing societies looking to claim government subsidies and net-metering credits.

services.title: Commercial & Industrial Solar
services.description: Cut operating costs and claim tax benefits with customized solar installations for commercial complexes, IT offices, or Bhosari-based factories.

services.title: Solar Water Pumps
services.description: Grid-independent solar pumps for farms and orchards around rural Pune and Mulshi, ensuring reliable watering without power cuts.

testimonials.name: Aniket Deshpande
testimonials.quote: Deccan Solar Tech installed a 5kW solar system for our bungalow in Kothrud. Our MSEDCL bill dropped from ₹8,000 a month to just ₹600. Vijay and his team handled the entire net-metering and subsidy approvals smoothly.

testimonials.name: Milind Ranade
testimonials.quote: Commercial electricity bills in Bhosari were a major overhead. Deccan Solar Tech designed and installed a 20kW rooftop solar system. It cut our monthly bills by over 45%, showing excellent return on investment.

faqs.question: What government subsidy can I get for residential solar in Pune?
faqs.question_localized: What government subsidy can I get for residential solar in Pune?
faqs.answer: Under the PM Surya Ghar Muft Bijli Yojana, homeowners can get up to ₹78,000 in central government subsidies for a 3kW system. Our team manages the entire portal registration and subsidy claim process for you.

faqs.question: How does the MSEDCL net metering process work?
faqs.question_localized: How does the MSEDCL net metering process work?
faqs.answer: We install a bi-directional meter from MSEDCL that tracks energy drawn and excess solar energy exported to the grid. Any surplus energy exported is credited to your monthly bill, effectively zeroing out your charges.
